THEOPHILUS, 829-842. AV Solidus (3.83 gms), Syracuse Mint, ca. 830-831. NGC AU, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 5/5.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
S-1670. Obverse: Crowned facing bust, wearing loros and holding cross potent; Reverse: Crowned facing bust, wearing chlamys holding globus cruciger. An extremely well centered and struck example of the type, showcasing the distinctive style of the Syracuse mint during this middle Byzantine period. Wonderfully alluring and...
